name: deepgene-plugins
description: DeepGene plugins for VCEP outreach and research

plugins.name: outreach
plugins.description: Research a single VCEP/ClinGen outreach target and produce a per-recipient email rooted in their committees, panel stage, and gene in focus.

plugins.name: dgai-hello
plugins.description: Greeting plugin for testing marketplace installs.

plugins.name: dgai-clingen
plugins.description: MCP server exposing ClinGen panel lookups (lookup_panel, list_chairs) over the public CSpec Registry — no API key required.
